title: Deepfakes Revisited
concept: Callback to Unit 219: diffusion and GAN-based generation dramatically lowered the skill and cost required to create convincing synthetic media.

exercises.prompt: Recall from Unit 219: What does the term 'GANs' are a key technology used to generate realistic synthetic media. What does GAN stand for?
exercises.explain: In Unit 219, we explored how tools like GANs generate realistic images by pitting two neural networks against each other.

cards.title: Seeing Isn't Believing
cards.body: We once believed that seeing was believing. But with the rise of modern AI, convincing fake videos can now be generated by almost anyone, anywhere, in seconds. Let's look at how the technology evolved to make this possible.

cards.title: What is a Deepfake?
cards.body: Deepfakes are synthetic media where a person's face or voice is replaced with someone else's. While they once required Hollywood-level budgets and expert animators, modern AI models like GANs and Diffusion have made creating them incredibly cheap and easy.

cards.title: The Instant Cake Mix
cards.body: Imagine baking a cake. It used to require a master chef, expensive tools, and hours of work. Now, a new instant cake-mix machine does it in ten seconds for pennies. Diffusion and GANs are that instant cake-mix machine for digital media, allowing anyone to 'bake' realistic videos instantly.

cards.title: From Hollywood to Handheld
cards.body: A teenager with a basic smartphone can now use a free app powered by diffusion models to swap their face onto a movie star's body in a video, producing a convincing result in just a few seconds.

cards.title: Myth: Only Experts Can Do It
cards.body: People think creating convincing deepfakes still requires supercomputers and elite hacking skills. In reality, user-friendly tools powered by advanced AI models allow anyone with a basic computer or phone to generate them.

cards.title: Old vs. New Creation
cards.body: Let's compare the old way of making fake videos with the modern AI-powered way.

left.text: Required expensive studio computers, professional animators, and weeks of manual editing.

right.text: Requires just a simple prompt or app using GANs/diffusion to generate realistic videos instantly.

exercises.prompt: Which technologies drastically lowered the skill barrier to make realistic synthetic media?
exercises.explain: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and diffusion models are the core AI breakthroughs that enabled cheap, high-quality media generation.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Creating a convincing deepfake still requires thousands of dollars and professional special effects software.
exercises.explain: Advanced AI models have made the process so simple and cheap that almost anyone can do it today.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete the explanation of modern deepfakes.
exercises.sentence: The cost of creating realistic synthetic media dropped because GANs and ________ models automated the process.
exercises.explain: GANs and diffusion models have automated the creation process, removing the need for manual editing skills.

exercises.prompt: Identify the piece of synthetic media (deepfake) from the options below:

options.text: A hand-drawn pencil portrait of a friend
A video of a politician speaking words they never actually said, generated by a GAN
A standard digital photograph taken with a smartphone camera

exercises.explain: The image generated by the AI model is synthetic media (a deepfake), while the hand-drawn painting and the real photograph are traditional media.

exercises.prompt: How did the arrival of diffusion models and GANs change the landscape of deepfakes and synthetic media?

options.text: They made creating deepfakes require highly advanced programming degrees.
They dramatically lowered the skill and cost needed to create realistic fake media.
They completely stopped the spread of fake videos online.
They made synthetic videos look obviously fake and cartoonish.

exercises.explain: Because GANs and diffusion models automated the complex process of generating realistic images and videos, the technical barriers and costs plummeted, making deepfake creation accessible to almost anyone.
